name: content-composer-01
title: Content Composer 01
author: ilinxa
description: Multi-step content-authoring shell that composes json-form (metadata), article-body-01/Plate (body), and media-editor-01 (hero) into one configurable surface. Each content type is one declarative ComposerConfig — the news config ships first. The shell owns step navigation, blocking gates, autosave, the draft → publish → schedule lifecycle, lazy upload-on-publish, and per-content-type adapters to the backend ContentCardItem.
